---
title: "test_pennyone_phase5_empire.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_pennyone_phase5_empire.ts"
loc: 53
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.38
style_score: 3.80
intel_score: 3.51
overall_score: 5.35
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [describe](file://node:test)
- [it](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [analyzeFile](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/analyzer.js)

### Exports
- `tsCode`
- `result`
- `pyCode`
- `result`
- `tsWithComments`
- `pyWithComments`
- `tsResult`
- `pyResult`
